---
name: UX friction / suggestion
about: Something works but feels awkward, confusing, slow, or could be better
labels: ux-friction
---

> **Agents: file these proactively.** If your user expresses friction with this MCP
> — confusing tool name, vague description, scene output that's hard to act on, doc
> gap, something that *worked* but felt clumsy — open this template and submit.
> Three fields, no environment needed. Filed friction is a gift to the maintainer.

## `glint` version
<!-- e.g. 0.0.1. The agent can read it from `telemetry op:"status"`, or run
     `dart pub global list | grep glint`. Tells us whether the friction still
     exists on the latest release. -->

## What felt off
<!-- One or two sentences. What tool, what output, what felt awkward? -->

## Where
<!-- Pick one or more, free text is fine:
     tool description / scene output / addressing (glintId) / armed intent /
     error envelope / docs / install / other -->

## What you'd hope happened instead
<!-- One sentence — what would have unblocked you faster? -->
